protocol.name: uwm_bar_unstable_v1

interface.name: zwp_uwm_bar_v1
interface.description:
A global interface used by bar clients to receive workspace state and focused window title from the UWM compositor.
One instance is created per output to support multi-monitor.

request.name: get_workspace_group

description.summary: get workspace group for an output

request.description: Create a workspace group object for the given output. If output is NULL, the group covers all workspaces.

interface.name: zwp_uwm_workspace_group_v1
interface.description: Reports workspace state and focused window title for a specific output. Events are sent in batches terminated by a done event.

event.name: workspace
event.description: Announces a workspace on this output. Sent at startup and on changes. The active flag is 1 if this is the current workspace on the output, 0 otherwise. The occupied flag is 1 if the workspace has any windows on it.

event.name: focused_title
event.description: The title of the currently focused window on the output associated with this workspace group.

event.name: done
event.description: Marks the end of a batch of workspace and title updates. The client should process all previous events in the batch before redrawing.
